properties.name: UT Outpost Main Location (SSB Ground Floor)
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Need a quick meal or snack on the UT campus? UT Outpost Satellites are conveniently located across the Forty Acres, offering grab-and-go options perfect for busy students. Stop by anytime – no appointment needed! This is situated on the ground floor of the Student Services Building.
properties.Eligibility: Must be a student at UT Austin with a UT ID
properties.Hours: Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday: 11:30 a.m. - 6 p.m., Friday: 11:30 a.m. - 5 p.m.

properties.name: UT Outpost Satellite - Biomedical Engineering Building (BME 5.202)
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Need a quick meal or snack on the UT campus? UT Outpost Satellites are conveniently located across the Forty Acres, offering grab-and-go options perfect for busy students. Stop by anytime – no appointment needed! This particular satellite is located in the Biomedical Engineering building.
properties.Address: 107 W Dean Keeton St, Austin, TX 78712
properties.Eligibility: Must be a student at UT Austin with a UT ID

properties.name: UT Outpost Satellite - College of Education Clothing Satellite (SZB 2.110)
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Students seeking professional attire for career-related events can visit the COE satellite location in SZB 2.110. This resource offers career clothing exclusively. Access to the clothing requires checking in at the front desk and being escorted to the career closet.
properties.Address: George I. Sánchez Bldg, 1912 Speedway, Austin, TX 78705
properties.Eligibility: Must be a student at UT Austin with a UT ID
properties.Hours: Monday - Friday: 9 a.m. - 11 a.m. and 1 p.m. - 4 p.m.

properties.name: UT Outpost Satellite - Flawn Academic Center
properties.description:
This satellite pantry location called UT for Me is powered by Dell scholars.
Learn More
properties.Eligibility: The UT for Me satellite pantry primarily serves UT for Me, EMERGE and Impact Scholars.

_umap_options.name: UT Outpost
_umap_options.description: UT Outpost is the university's on-campus food pantry and career closet. It offers free produce, pantry staples, and refrigerated items. No proof of income is required — just a valid UT student ID.
